name: Cutea Bubbletea
description: A cosy, pink-themed bubble tea shop near Schouwburgplein, known for its cheese and cake foam add-ons and freshly made fruit teas.

name: YOYO! Fresh Tea Bar
description: A spacious tea bar close to Rotterdam Centraal with self-service ordering screens and a wide range of fruit and milk teas.

name: machi machi Rotterdam
description: A minimalist bubble tea and matcha spot near Markthal and Blaak station, praised for its rich matcha lattes and thick tapioca pearls.

name: CoCo Bubble Tea (Koopgoot)
specialty: Adjustable sugar level classic milk tea
description: A well-known bubble tea chain located in the heart of the Koopgoot shopping street, offering fully adjustable sugar levels on all drinks.

name: 8tea5 Rotterdam
description: A colourfully decorated bubble tea bar on Stadhuisplein with an 80s-inspired interior and a signature dirty milk tea.

name: TEA&TEA Bubble Milk Tea
description: A small, handmade bubble tea shop known for fresh-crushed fruit teas and chewy tapioca pearls with thick cheese foam.

name: InfiniTea (Markthal)
address: Dominee Jan Scharpstraat 298, Unit 51, 3011 PB Rotterdam
description: A tea stall inside Markthal where you can smell the tea blends before ordering, also selling DIY bubble tea kits.

name: ONE SIP
description: A friendly, newer bubble tea shop near Meent with competitive pricing, adjustable ice and sugar levels, and indoor seating.
